author: razorclients
content:
The first SSZ Engine API breakout call is Next Friday!

Fri, Jun 26 | 13:00 UTC (<t:1782478800:F>)

We'll discuss specification, implementation, and testing of the REST-SSZ Engine API, with status updates from the team

Agenda: <https://github.com/ethereum/pm/issues/2132>
Meeting Link: [Zoom](<https://ethereumfoundation.zoom.us/j/86111351882?pwd=k0fTLCL3yR6ebh5k0v6tTeVlbHEb9c.1>)
